title: jasminum officinale f. affine
intro: Jasminum officinale f. affine, also known as the 'primrose jasmine', is a fragrant flowering plant belonging to the family Oleaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum officinale f. affine include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Jasminum officinale f. affine can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
